### Important Note

- Minimize the number of documentation you generate when proceeding codebase edits. Focus on the files that have been changed.
- When a feature is removed, do not suggest backward-compatible code that supports the removed feature.
- DO NOT CREATE REPORT WHEN YOUR TASK IS FINISHED, instead summarize your changes in a few sentences.
- Judgehost is always running at localhost:3000 in hot reload mode, never try to start it again.
